### 2141128
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E19 - The Birthday That Wasn't**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:02  
⌛ May 6, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141128&mediaid=01d4d7f00c41cd3d5083c2b512451cfec7a430d3) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/the-birthday-that-wasnt-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141128` mediaid=`01d4d7f00c41cd3d5083c2b512451cfec7a430d3`  
_Dibble misunderstands the Bears' intentions when they secretly make a plush toy Whiffle for her "Un-birthday." Thinking it's real and that the Bears love it more than they love her, she steals it and plans to leave it in the forest. She has second thoughts and returns her "rival" to her friends, only to learn that it's a gift to show their love for her._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141128_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
